_description: M-CHAT Autism Spectrum Disorder screening. A_Score fields: 1=Yes (symptom present), 0=No.

_field_notes.A1_Score: Does child look at you when you call their name?  1=Yes 0=No
_field_notes.A2_Score: Does child use pointing to show interest?          1=Yes 0=No
_field_notes.A3_Score: Does child engage in pretend play?                 1=Yes 0=No
_field_notes.A4_Score: Does child show interest in other children?        1=Yes 0=No
_field_notes.A5_Score: Does child bring objects to show you?              1=Yes 0=No
_field_notes.A6_Score: Does child make eye contact with you?              1=Yes 0=No
_field_notes.A8_Score: Does child respond to their name being called?     1=Yes 0=No
_field_notes.A10_Score: Does child smile in response to your smile?        1=Yes 0=No
_field_notes.ethnicity: White European | Asian | Middle Eastern | Black | Hispanic | Others
_field_notes.jaundice: yes or no — jaundice at birth
_field_notes.austim: yes or no — family history of autism
_field_notes.contry_of_res: Country of residence string (e.g. United States)
_field_notes.used_app_before: yes or no — prior use of screening app
_field_notes.result: Total A_Score sum (0-10). Set to sum of A1..A10 if not explicitly stated.
_field_notes.relation: Self | Parent | Relative | Health care professional | Others
